documentation:
# usfmtc

Unified Standard Format Markup is the primary file format for the source of
bible translations. It is available in 3 serializations: USFM which is a simple
text markup using TeX style backslash codes to mark the various elements; USX
which is an XML serialization and USJ which is a JSON serialization.

The usfmtc package contains parsers and generators for USFM, USX and USJ. There
are two parsers and generators for USFM: validating and non validating.

The package comes with a script: usfmconv that can read any of the 3 file
formats and output to any of the 3 file formats.

The primary entry point for python is the usfmtc module:

```
from usfmtc import readFile

usfmdoc = readFile(infile)
usfmdoc.saveAs(outfile)
```

documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3

Compatibility API for rnc2rng 1.0

documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3

methods.name: usfmtc.usfmparser.USFMParser._c
documentation: ### Event methods

modules.name: usfmtc.rnc2rng.serializer
documentation: Convert an RELAX NG compact syntax schema to a Node tree
This file released to the Public Domain by David Mertz

methods.name: usfmtc.rnc2rng.serializer.XMLSerializer.visit
documentation:
Visiting a list of nodes, writes out the XML content to the internal
line-based buffer. By default, adds one level of indentation to the
output compared to the caller's level; passing False as the second
argument will prevent this from happening.

modules.name: usfmtc.extension
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3

functions.name: usfmtc.usjproc.usxtousj
documentation:
The core function for the process.
input: parsed XML element for the whole USX
output: dict object as per the JSON schema

functions.name: usfmtc.usjproc.convert_usx
documentation:
Accepts an XML object of USX and returns a Dict corresponding to it.
Traverses the children, recursively

methods.name: usfmtc.xmlutils.ParentElement._getindex
documentation: Finds my index in my parent, returning both

methods.name: usfmtc.xmlutils.ParentElement.getprevious
documentation: Returns the previous element with the same parent, if any

methods.name: usfmtc.xmlutils.ParentElement.getnext
documentation: Returns the next element with the same parent, if any

methods.name: usfmtc.xmlutils.ParentElement.getnext_sibling
documentation:
Returns the next element, while going up and down the hierarchy.
Notice that any text at the start of an element stops any hierarchy descent

methods.name: usfmtc.xmlutils.ParentElement.getprevious_sibling
documentation:
Returns the previous element, while going up and down the hierarchy
Notice that any text after an element stops any hierarchy descent

methods.name: usfmtc.xmlutils.ParentElement.addprevious
documentation: Inserts el before the current element in the same parent

methods.name: usfmtc.xmlutils.ParentElement.getparent
documentation: Returns the parent

modules.name: usfmtc
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3
nuitka configuration
nuitka-project: --onefile
nuitka-project: --include-data-files={MAIN_DIRECTORY}/usx.rng=usx.rng
nuitka-project-if: {OS} in ("Windows",):
nuitka-project: --output-filename=usfmconv.exe
nuitka-project-else:
nuitka-project: --output-filename=usfmconv.bin

functions.name: usfmtc.usfmGrammar
documentation: Create UsfmGrammarParser from gsrc as used by USX.fromUsfm

functions.name: usfmtc.readFile
documentation:
Reads a USFM file of a given type or inferred from the filename
extension. extfiles allows for extra markers.ext files to extend the grammar

methods.name: usfmtc.USX.fromUsx
documentation: Loads USX and creates USX object to hold it

methods.name: usfmtc.USX.fromUsfm
documentation:
Parses USFM using UsfmGrammarParser grammar and creates USX object.
Raise usfmtc.parser.NoParseError on error.
elfactory must take parent and pos named parameters not as attributes

methods.name: usfmtc.USX.outUsx
documentation: Output pretty XML USX. If file is None returns string

methods.name: usfmtc.USX.outUsfm
documentation: Output USFM from USX object. grammar is et doc. If file is None returns string

methods.name: usfmtc.USX.outUsj
documentation: Output USJ from USX object. If file is None returns dict

methods.name: usfmtc.USX.saveAs
documentation:
Saves the document to a file in the appropriate format, either given
or inferred from the filename extension.

methods.name: usfmtc.USX.getroot
documentation: Returns root XML element

methods.name: usfmtc.USX.addesids
documentation: Add esids to USX object (eid, sids, vids)

modules.name: usfmtc.railroad
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

variables.name: usfmtc.railroad.DEBUG
documentation: if true, writes some debug information into attributes

variables.name: usfmtc.railroad.VS
documentation: minimum vertical separation between things. For a 3px stroke, must be at least 4

variables.name: usfmtc.railroad.AR
documentation: radius of arcs

variables.name: usfmtc.railroad.DIAGRAM_CLASS
documentation: class to put on the root <svg>

variables.name: usfmtc.railroad.STROKE_ODD_PIXEL_LENGTH
documentation: is the stroke width an odd (1px, 3px, etc) pixel length?

variables.name: usfmtc.railroad.INTERNAL_ALIGNMENT
documentation: how to align items when they have extra space. left/right/center

variables.name: usfmtc.railroad.CHAR_WIDTH
documentation: width of each monospace character. play until you find the right value for your font

variables.name: usfmtc.railroad.COMMENT_CHAR_WIDTH
documentation: comments are in smaller text by default

variables.name: usfmtc.rnc2rng.parser.str_types
documentation: noqa: unicode not defined in Python 3

class_variables.name: usfmtc.parser.Parser.debug
documentation: False

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel.messup
documentation:
Opposite of cleanup, to prepare a USX XML structure for USFM generation.
Returns a copy of the structure so as not to polute the core data.

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel.strnormal
documentation:
strips whitespace according to element type and mode:
mode & 1 strips lhs
mode & 2 strips rhs

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel.findel
documentation:
Search for an element with the given tag and attrib matching forwards from
node, including down into children. Returns a node. Limits is a list of stop
tags that cause the search to fail, returning None.

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel._findelchild
documentation:
Recursively search for a node with given tag and attributes returning the node
on success or None. Limits is a list of stop tags, which if encountered trigger
a StopIteration exception.

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel.findtext
documentation: Iterator returning text strings until an element in limits is encountered

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel._findtextchild
documentation:
Recursively iterates returning text strings between elements until an element
in limits is encountered.

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel.findref
documentation: From a reference, return a USXLoc (element, attribute and char index)

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel.copy_range
documentation: Create a new tree from a starting USXloc to an ending one.

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel._copy_downto
documentation: Copies as much of el into curr until it hits b, or everything

functions.name: usfmtc.usxmodel._copy_upto
documentation:
Copy from the parent into curr going down each of its children until it hits b.
Keep going up until we eventually hit b or the end of the world.

class_variables.name: usfmtc.usxmodel.USXLoc.attrib
documentation: " text", " tail". Where the .char indexes into
